announcement.text: Dashboard upgraded to live data — GHL + Asana refresh hourly.

items: Workflows are up and in place — confirm all running correctly
GHL connection to Shopify: blocked — Shopify needs to update their site with API integration first
Auto-publish endpoint is live — agenda updates now flow directly from Claude
[MirthPlus] Separate MirthPlus contacts from SailPin contacts in GHL
[MirthPlus] Re-assign Google Voice contacts (chiropractors, massage centers, other businesses from previous email campaigns) to MirthPlus

pinnedNotes.title: Dashboard Live
pinnedNotes.text: GHL contacts, pipeline, and Asana tasks now pull automatically every hour.

pinnedNotes.title: Auto-Publish Active
pinnedNotes.text: Dashboard content can now be updated by dictating to Claude — no terminal or git needed.

statusUpdates.note: Vercel serverless API routes deployed. GHL + Asana data flowing. Auto-publish endpoint active.
